cta.headline: Ready to Secure Your Property?

servicesPage.intro: AOCO Locksmiths LLC provides comprehensive locksmith services in Irving, TX. Whether you're locked out, need new locks, or want to upgrade your security, our experienced team is ready to help 24/7.

services.title: Emergency Lockout Service
services.shortDescription: Fast response when you're locked out of your home, car, or business.
services.longDescription: Locked out? Don't panic. AOCO Locksmiths offers 24/7 emergency lockout service in Irving. Our technicians arrive quickly, often within 30 minutes, and use non-destructive techniques to get you back inside safely.
benefits: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Call Us
process.description: Call (972) 579-9770 and we'll dispatch a technician immediately.

process.title: We Arrive
process.description: We arrive at your location promptly, often within 30 minutes.

process.title: We Unlock
process.description: We safely unlock your property without damage, then advise on security upgrades.

faqs.question: How much does an emergency lockout cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies by time and complexity, but we provide upfront quotes before any work begins. Call for a free estimate.

faqs.question: Do you service all of Irving?
faqs.answer: Yes, we cover all of Irving and surrounding areas including Las Colinas, Coppell, and Valley Ranch.

services.title: Residential Lock Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your home with expert lock installation, rekeying, and repairs.
services.longDescription: Your home's security is our priority. We install high-quality deadbolts, smart locks, and keyless entry systems. We also offer rekeying services so you can have peace of mind after moving into a new home.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current locks and security needs.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We recommend the best solutions for your home and budget.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We professionally install or rekey your locks, ensuring everything works perfectly.

faqs.question: Should I rekey or replace my locks?
faqs.answer: Rekeying is cheaper and works well if your locks are in good condition. Replacement is better for outdated or damaged locks.

faqs.question: Do you install smart locks?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install and configure popular smart locks like August, Schlage, and Yale.

services.title: Commercial Locksmith Services
services.shortDescription: Secure your business with high-security locks and access control.
services.longDescription: We help Irving businesses protect their assets with commercial-grade locks, access control systems, and master key solutions. Our team works quickly to minimize downtime.

process.title: Custom Plan
process.description: We design a security solution tailored to your business.

process.title: Installation & Training
process.description: We install the system and train your staff on usage.

faqs.question: Do you offer master key systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design master key systems that allow different access levels for employees.

faqs.question: Can you install access control?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install keypad, card, and biometric access systems.

services.title: Automotive Locksmith
services.shortDescription: Car key replacement, lockout help, and ignition repair.
services.longDescription: Locked out of your car? Need a new key? Our automotive locksmiths can help with key extraction, transponder key programming, and ignition repair for most makes and models.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We identify the issue – lockout, broken key, or ignition problem.

process.title: Service
process.description: We use specialized tools to unlock or repair your vehicle.

process.title: Test
process.description: We test everything to ensure it works before leaving.

faqs.question: Can you make a key for my car if I lost all copies?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can create a new key using your VIN and proof of ownership.

faqs.question: Do you program transponder keys?
faqs.answer: Yes, we program transponder keys for most cars, including newer models.

about.headline: Your Local Locksmith Experts in Irving, TX
about.mission: To provide fast, reliable, and transparent locksmith services to the Irving community, ensuring every customer feels safe and secure.
story: AOCO Locksmiths LLC was founded with a simple mission: deliver honest, professional locksmith services to Irving and surrounding areas. With over 15 years of combined experience, our team has helped thousands of residents and businesses with everything from emergency lockouts to comprehensive security upgrades.

We pride ourselves on our reputation for integrity and fast response. Every technician is background-checked, licensed, and trained to handle the latest lock and security technologies. Whether it's 2 PM or 2 AM, we're ready to help.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always provide honest advice and transparent pricing.

coreValues.title: Speed
coreValues.description: We understand emergencies can't wait, so we prioritize quick response times.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade locks and tools to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve our neighbors in Irving and give back locally.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form for a free quote.
